links.userGuideDesc: Feature guide, learning tips, sharing methods

guide.title: User Guide
guide.desc: Feature guide, learning tips, sharing methods

theme.title: Theme
theme.description: Choose your preferred appearance. System will follow your device settings.

srs.title: SRS Learning
srs.description: Set the number of new cards added per session in SRS (spaced repetition) mode
srs.help: Max number of new cards in addition to review cards in SRS learning. Review cards are not affected by this limit.
srs.newCardNote: Max number of new cards in addition to review cards in SRS learning. Review cards are not affected by this limit.

answerMode.title: Answer Mode
answerMode.description: Set how you choose answers during study
answerMode.swipeAutoNote:
Swipe directions are set automatically based on study mode.
• SRS: ← Again / → Good
• Other modes: ← Unknown / → Known

tts.title: Auto TTS Reading
tts.description: Auto-read TTS-enabled fields when flipping card
tts.help: TTS language follows field settings in card template. Play button always shows regardless of auto reading.
tts.note: TTS language follows field settings in card template. Play button always shows regardless of auto reading.

apiKey.title: API Key Management
apiKey.limit: You can create up to 1 API key
apiKey.maxKeys: You can create up to 1 API key
apiKey.masked: Cannot be viewed again for security
apiKey.securityNote: Cannot be viewed again for security
apiKey.showOnceWarning: This key won't be shown again — copy it now and store it safely.
apiKey.unrecoverable: This key can't be retrieved on this device. If you lost it, delete this key and generate a new one.

aiProvider.title: AI Providers
aiProvider.description: Manage providers and API keys for AI auto-generation
aiProvider.securityNote: API keys are AES-256 encrypted and stored in your browser. Never sent to our servers.
aiProvider.noProviders: No providers configured. Set up above.

reminders.title: Study Reminders
reminders.description: Get reminded to study daily, just like Duolingo.

export.title: Export My Data
export.description: Download your data as CSV files.
export.cardsDesc: All card data with SRS status (up to 10,000)

goal.title: Daily Study Goal
goal.description: Set a daily study target in minutes. Leave empty for no goal.
